Phenotype is the expression  of traits by an organism or being. It has four types<ref>This comes from a book please mention if you have found it</ref>

# Absolute genetic
# Facultative genetic (almost all organisms have this, it’s the mark of earth tier complexity.)
# Learned nontransmissible (i.e. [[Servitors]], antibodies, marks something as a [[Learners|Learner]] if complex enough)
# Learned transmissible (i.e. [[memes]], breast milk antibody transmission, marks something as a [[sapient]] if complex enough)

== Reference ==
[[Category:Biology]]
[[Category:Sapient Psychology]]
[[sn:Phenotype]][[sn:Phenotype]][[Category:Learner Psychology]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Phenotype]]
[[Category:Pages]]
